name: Modular & Prefabricated Infrastructure
description: Factory-built modules, skids, enclosure systems, and prefabricated infrastructure packages for AI, edge, and industrial compute deployments.

name: Containerized Data Centers
description: Container-based and transportable data center systems for rapid deployment, mining, edge, and remote workloads.

name: AI Colocation & GPU Hosting
description: Providers offering GPU capacity, AI colocation, bare-metal clusters, and deployment-ready compute environments.

name: Immersion Cooling
description: Single-phase and two-phase immersion vendors serving dense AI, HPC, and mining infrastructure.

name: Liquid Cooling
description: Direct-to-chip, cold-plate, CDU, and liquid loop providers for high-density compute environments.

name: Power & Electrical Infrastructure
description: Electrical backbone vendors across switchgear, PDUs, busway, substations, ATS, and site power systems.

name: Generators & Microgrids
description: Backup generation, distributed energy, microgrids, and resiliency systems for power-constrained deployments.

name: UPS & Battery Storage
description: UPS systems, battery-backed resiliency, and energy storage products supporting uptime and power smoothing.

name: Switchgear, PDU & Busway
description: Critical distribution components spanning low/medium-voltage switchgear, rack PDUs, remote power panels, and busway.

name: Modular Substations
description: Packaged substation systems and electrical yard modules for fast-track compute and industrial energy deployments.

name: ATS & Transfer Systems
description: Automatic transfer switches and related switching systems used across resilient compute infrastructure.

name: Power Monitoring & Energy Management
description: Metering, telemetry, and energy software for power quality, visibility, and infrastructure optimization.

name: HVAC & Thermal Rejection
description: Heat rejection, mechanical cooling, chillers, dry coolers, and HVAC infrastructure for dense compute loads.

name: Rear-Door & Direct-to-Chip Cooling
description: Rear-door heat exchangers and chip-level cooling systems for dense AI rack environments.

name: High-Density Rack Power
description: Rack-level power architecture and distribution for AI, HPC, and dense infrastructure deployments.

name: Edge & Micro Data Centers
description: Distributed, regional, and micro data center systems for edge AI, industrial, and field-deployed capacity.

name: Network Fabric & Connectivity
description: Optics, switching, structured cabling, and network infrastructure that supports AI compute environments.

name: Monitoring & Controls
description: DCIM, observability, controls, telemetry, and automation layers for infrastructure operations.

name: Field Services & Maintenance
description: Commissioning, field support, deployment services, and ongoing maintenance for critical infrastructure.

name: Electrical Integration Services
description: Integrators and contractors stitching power, controls, and facility systems together on site.

name: Infrastructure Logistics
description: Heavy-haul, rigging, transport, and deployment logistics supporting physical AI infrastructure buildouts.

name: EPC & Commissioning

name: Site Selection & Land Strategy
description: Land, utility, and siting specialists supporting new AI, mining, and industrial compute deployment decisions.

name: Sustainability & Energy Strategy
description: Energy sourcing, load planning, and sustainability strategy providers for infrastructure-intensive compute programs.

name: DCIM & Observability
description: Software and monitoring systems that surface infrastructure health, telemetry, alarms, and capacity trends.

name: Direct-to-Chip Cooling

name: Liquid Loop Systems
